# Hi.. My name is Ammar Yazid
I am a developer passionate about building innovative programs and learning new technologies. Currently, I am focusing on web development..<br><br>    🌱 I am deepening my expertise as a full-stack developer.<br>    💬 I am also delving into Python, JavaScript, and UI/UX design.<br>

<hr>
